# Nzrv Blog

> Personal blog about Software Engineering and DevOps by Petr Nazarov.

## About

This blog contains notes and articles about software engineering, DevOps practices, containerization, orchestration, and related topics.

## Author

- Name: Petr Nazarov
- Role: Software Architect & DevOps Engineer
- Website: https://cv.nzrv.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/petr-nazarov

## Links

- Blog: https://blog.nzrv.dev
- RSS: https://blog.nzrv.dev/rss.xml
